privacy_model: Local dictation, no telemetry, no cloud transcription endpoint

network_calls.name: first_launch_model_download
network_calls.when: First launch until the model weights are cached locally; again if the local cache fails its integrity check and is re-downloaded; again when the user chooses Reset Speech Model Cache
network_calls.purpose: FluidAudio downloads the Parakeet TDT v3 CoreML model weights
network_calls.data_sent: Standard HTTPS request metadata; no dictation audio. If HF_TOKEN, HUGGING_FACE_HUB_TOKEN, or HUGGINGFACEHUB_API_TOKEN is set in the environment, FluidAudio attaches it as an Authorization header to huggingface.co; most users do not have these set

network_calls.name: update_check
network_calls.when: Every 6 hours when automatic update checks are enabled, plus one check shortly after launch
network_calls.purpose: Check whether a newer Parakey release is available and notify the user
network_calls.data_sent: GET with a fixed User-Agent header, exactly parakey-update-check; no version, device, or user identifiers, and no transcript, microphone audio, settings, or usage counts

network_calls.name: user_triggered_install_or_update
network_calls.when: Only when the user downloads the app directly, installs through Homebrew, or chooses to update through the menu or Homebrew
network_calls.purpose: User-triggered install/update flow: direct browser download of the signed GitHub release archive, or Homebrew tap and metadata refresh followed by the same signed release archive
network_calls.data_sent: Browser or Homebrew request metadata; no dictation audio

local_storage.transcripts: Recent transcript history is in memory only and clears on quit
local_storage.clipboard: Pasted transcripts go through the system pasteboard and stay there until overwritten; Parakey deliberately does not restore the previous clipboard contents, so the last dictation remains visible to clipboard managers and Universal Clipboard
